    About this item

    • Shoes' Upper- These men's shoes for men have a breathable mesh upper that lets air flow inside and keeps your feet dry and cozy. You can wear them with any outfit, whether formal or casual, for work or college. They are also suitable for outdoor activities like yoga, running, jogging, or brisk walking. The lightweight material of these shoes makes your feet feel comfortable all day long!
    • Shoes' Outsole- These men's shoes come equipped with a special Ball Tech in the midsole that cushions your heels for a smooth landing. This addition is colorful and fun, and they make your running shoes bounce more. You can wear these shoes for many outdoor activities, like running, gymming, walking, power yoga, and more.
    • Shoes' Insole- These men's Shoes have a PU Foam Insole that provides comfort for all-day use. Whether you need them for daily activities or night-outs, these running shoes for men will keep you comfortable all the time.
    • Style the Shoes-Pair these stylish shoes for men with slim-fitting jeans or chinos for a polished yet relaxed appearance. Carry a casual shirt on top for a stylish work-day look and replace it with a cool t-shirt to hang out with friends.
    • Clean your shoes- To keep these shoes in good condition just remove any dust from the surface with a dry cloth every day. Second, wash these running shoes with soap water once a month and let them air dry. These shoes are washable and easy to clean and dry.

      Product description

      Go for jogs, hit the gym or even play your favorite sport wearing this pair of shoes from Campus. Crafted with care, it will ensure that your feet stay comfortable for long hours. It features a sturdy mesh upper which adds to the overall look and slip-resistant phylon sole crafted with thousands of tiny crazy balls, feels like a soft, bouncy bean bag which provides comfort and negates the chance of accidental falls. Wear it with a T-Shirt and shorts to look smart.

      How are ratings calculated?
      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Customers say

      Customers find these running shoes to be of good quality, comfortable, and excellent for both running and walking, with good value for money. They appreciate the appearance and lightweight design, with one customer noting they're particularly suitable for running on ground and smooth roads. The fit receives mixed feedback - while some find them amazing, others report they're slightly tight in the front. Durability is also mixed, with some customers reporting no damage while others say they're not durable for long-term use.

      • Aditya kajale
        5.0 out of 5 stars Excellent Quality and Very Comfortable Shoes
        Reviewed in India on 25 February 2026
        Size: 9 UKColour: L.GRY/BLKVerified Purchase
        I have been using these shoes for more than 6 months now, and I am really impressed with the quality. The product is very well-made, durable, and still looks great even after regular use. They are extremely comfortable for daily wear, long hours of walking, and even for running. The cushioning and fit are excellent, providing good support and comfort during runs as well. I never feel discomfort while wearing them. Overall, a very good quality product — highly recommended for anyone looking for comfortable, durable, and running-friendly shoes.

      • Krishan K.
        3.0 out of 5 stars Quality
        Reviewed in India on 25 December 2025
        Size: 9 UKColour: Wht/Sil/B.OrgVerified Purchase
        I was initially happy with the look and fit of these shoes, but they have a significant manufacturing defect. There is a small gap where the sole meets the upper material. Even in light rain or walking through shallow puddles, water seeps directly into the shoe. Not only does this make them uncomfortable to wear, but the moisture is already starting to damage the interior materials. Disappointing quality for the price.
        So better some glue or feviquick so the water don't get inside and this defect is in all shoes
        Read more
        Krishan K.
        3.0 out of 5 stars
        Quality

        Reviewed in India on 25 December 2025
        I was initially happy with the look and fit of these shoes, but they have a significant manufacturing defect. There is a small gap where the sole meets the upper material. Even in light rain or walking through shallow puddles, water seeps directly into the shoe. Not only does this make them uncomfortable to wear, but the moisture is already starting to damage the interior materials. Disappointing quality for the price.
        So better some glue or feviquick so the water don't get inside and this defect is in all shoes
